title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from the Middle East, made with tender lamb and fragrant spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice, spices, and 1 cup of water to the saucepan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
